metadata.title:
SAY WATER FAMINE


IS DUE TO IGNORANCE

pages.raw_text:
Water power men claim today
that a whole week has been lost
at the pumping station in waiting
for lignum vitae step for one of
the wheels when an oak step could
have been turned out here and put
in position in a few hours.


1t is claimed that oak Is used
for w. w. P. Co. water wheels,
which are three times as large as
those used by the city.


The breaking of the step, which
is block Of hard wood upon
which the end Of the wheel shaft
rests, is held largely responsible
for the prevailing water scarcity.
The water department sent away
for one and has been waiting for
1t for more than week. KnOwl
edge of water power, 1t is stated,
would have obviated this delay by
making use OF oak, at least until
the lignum vitae ordered arrived.


People interested in the water
question, which means every resi-
